brand_story.label: Our Story
brand_story.headline: Where Science Meets Luxury
brand_story.body: Born in Dubai, By Hayat Skin is a luxury skincare house dedicated to the art of personalized beauty. We combine dermatology-inspired formulations with the opulence of a luxury brand — creating skincare rituals that transform, protect, and elevate.

skin_diagnosis.label: Skin Analysis
skin_diagnosis.headline: Discover Your Skin Type
skin_diagnosis.subheadline: Select your skin type to receive a personalized routine and product recommendations.

dry.name: Dry Skin
dry.description: Lacks moisture, feels tight and flaky

oily.name: Oily Skin
oily.description: Excess sebum, prone to shine and breakouts

consultation.label: Personalized Care
consultation.headline: Your Skin, Your Ritual
consultation.subheadline: Our expert consultation system analyzes your unique skin profile to create a bespoke skincare routine.

expert.desc: Every product is hand-selected by skincare specialists with clinical expertise.

climate.title: Dubai Climate Optimized
climate.desc: Formulations designed for the heat, humidity, and UV intensity of the UAE.

luxury.title: Luxury Selection
luxury.desc: Only the finest ingredients and most effective formulations make our collection.

personal.title: Personalized System
personal.desc: No two skins are alike. Your routine is built exclusively for you.

longterm.title: Long-Term Strategy
longterm.desc: We focus on lasting skin health, not quick fixes.
